title: Knives Remodeled
description: Farmer's Delight knives remodeled, vanilla style.
body:
![Knives Remodeled Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0bd16476f5c03cf52123ab75e559e4d0c55d637.png)
[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) knives remodeled, vanilla style.

Embrace your inner chef! This resource pack contains new custom models and textures for Farmer’s Delight’s (and an addon) knives that resemble kitchen knives using the vanilla colour palette.

This resource pack was tested in 1.20.1 Minecraft Java. However, it should also work on older/newer versions.

![All available knives](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/383559d62257ac4467cb4f61332066ba7143e1d6.png)

### Includes
- Flint Knife (Farmer's Delight)
- Golden Knife (Farmer's Delight)
- Iron Knife (Farmer's Delight)
- Diamond Knife (Farmer's Delight)
- Netherite Knife (Farmer's Delight)
- Copper Knife (Create Misc & Things)
